label: Sequences, events & time series

node.label: Sequences, events & time series
node.definition: Ordered observations represent language, events, trajectories, biological sequences, and temporal processes.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Sequences, events & time series is to connect Discrete mathematics & logic, Signal processing & harmonic analysis to downstream capabilities including Waveforms, audio & spectrograms, Positional, temporal & coordinate encodings, Markov chains, MDPs, POMDPs & belief states.
examples: substrate for Positional, temporal & coordinate encodings
substrate for Markov chains, MDPs, POMDPs & belief states
limitations: Encoding choices can discard information, amplify bias, or make important invariances difficult to learn. Its direct dependencies include Discrete mathematics & logic, Signal processing & harmonic analysis.

dependencies.rationale: Sequences, events & time series rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Discrete mathematics & logic.
Sequences, events & time series rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Signal processing & harmonic analysis.
Sequences, events & time series rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Algorithms & data structures.

sentence_units.text: Ordered observations represent language, events, trajectories, biological sequences, and temporal processes.

The role of Sequences, events & time series is to connect Discrete mathematics & logic, Signal processing & harmonic analysis to downstream capabilities including Waveforms, audio & spectrograms, Positional, temporal & coordinate encodings, Markov chains, MDPs, POMDPs & belief states.
